programs.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programs.desc: Martin is in London to meet a mum helping her daughter to get on the property ladder. And Jacqui's perplexed by the layout of two linked flats that she feels should just be one.

programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Students take on lecturers at an antiques fair in Wetherby, with experts Philip Serrell and Jonathan Pratt. Meanwhile, Caroline shows fair-goers a horsehair-stuffed mystery item.

programs.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programs.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programs.title: Scam Interceptors
programs.desc: A man is on the phone to a tech support scammer, leaving the team struggling to find a way to get through to him and stop the scam. And we chat to a fake Jennifer Aniston.

programs.title: Attenborough and the Sea Dragon
programs.desc: Following David Attenborough as he attempts to animate the life of the ichthyosaur whose 200-million-year-old fossil remains were found on Britain's Jurassic coast.

programs.title: Escape to the Country
programs.desc: The owners of six Irish wolfhounds look for a property in Suffolk with a bit more space.
